questionTemplate: [PLACE:place_type=STORE:*:#P][ITEM:type=(#P:t):*:#2][NUM:min=0;max=1:*:#W][HUMAN:#1] [VERB:id=enter;t=past;g=(#1:g);num=s] ל[#P:s] ו[VERB:id=buy;t=past;g=(#1:g);num=s] [NUM:min=10;max=20:#X] [#2:p]. questionTemplate: [PLACE:place_type=HOME|EDUCATION:*:#P][ITEM:type=(#P:t):*:#2][NUM:min=0;max=1:*:#W][NUM:min=3;max=6:*:#Y][NUM:min=2;max=5:*:#PER_FRIEND][NUM:value=(#Y:mul_(#PER_FRIEND)):*:#X][HUMAN:#1] [VERB:id=find;t=past;g=(#1:g);num=s] [#X] [#2:p] ב[#P:s]. [#1:he_she] [VERB:id=divide;t=past;g=(#1:g);num=s] אותם שווה בשווה בין [#Y] חברים. questionTemplate: [ITEM:unit_type=LENGTH:*:#2][UNIT:type=LENGTH:*:#U][NUM:min=0;max=1:*:#W][HUMAN:#1] [VERB:id=take;t=past;g=(#1:g);num=s] [#2:s] באורך [NUM:min=20;max=50:#X] [#U:p]. questionTemplate: [PLACE:place_type=STORE:*:#P][ITEM:type=(#P:t):*:#2][NUM:min=0;max=1:*:#W][NUM:min=2;max=4:*:#Z][HUMAN:#1] [VERB:id=buy;t=past;g=(#1:g);num=s] [#2:s] ב[#P:s]. המחיר הוא [NUM:min=10;max=20:#X] שקלים. questionTemplate: [PLACE:place_type=EDUCATION|ENTERTAINMENT:*:#P][NUM:min=0;max=1:*:#W][HUMAN:#1] [VERB:id=arrange;t=past;g=(#1:g);num=s] כיסאות ב[#P:s].
